prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic wide shot in a dusty desert mountain wasteland, blending ancient Chinese wuxia fantasy with a modern punk survivor character. Show exactly 4 young women standing in a dramatic lineup, all facing the camera with serious, defiant expressions: 1) left woman in a pale mint-green flowing hanfu robe with long black hair half tied in a top bun, holding a sheathed ornate sword diagonally at her waist; 2) center-front woman in a black layered martial-arts robe with messy high bun hair, gripping a short curved dagger forward in a threatening pose; 3) center-rear woman in a faded beige-green robe with long dark hair, aiming a tall wooden bow directly toward the viewer with an arrow drawn; 4) right woman with short pink hair wearing a black tank top, ripped dark denim shorts, black headphones around her neck, one hand on her hip and the other holding a cigarette near her mouth. Set them in a sandy, windblown canyon with hazy mountains in the background, warm beige sunlight, airborne dust, faint smoke from the cigarette, and a partially visible old car wreck behind the modern woman on the right. Use a gritty movie still look, realistic skin and fabric texture, shallow depth of field, muted earth tones, high detail, natural lens perspective, 16:9 aspect ratio. The overall mood should feel like post-apocalyptic wuxia standoff, with no visible text, no watermark, and no extra people.
